_comment: Per-client configuration for Speed to Lead. All sensitive values (google_key, API keys) must be stored as n8n environment variables and referenced from there — never stored in this file in plain text.

env_vars_required.GOOGLE_KEY: Shared secret from Google Ads Lead Form settings
env_vars_required.TWILIO_SENDER_ID: Alphanumeric sender ID — e.g. DupontPlomb (max 11 chars, pre-registered with Twilio France)
env_vars_required.BAPTISTE_PHONE: Baptiste's mobile in E.164 format — receives error fallback SMS

_rgpd_note: RGPD pre-launch requirement: Lead Form must include a pre-unchecked consent checkbox: 'J accepte d etre contacte(e) par SMS par Dupont Plomberie concernant ma demande.' Consent must be collected before first production send.
